forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.
Cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Mostly clear. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west in the morning and early afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly clear. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 24.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the morning then tending east to northeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.
Mostly clear. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Ceduna. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning easterly in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then tending east to northeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then turning west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Mostly clear. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 32.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the far west, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Coober Pedy. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 35.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Coober Pedy in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Coober Pedy in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon then tending northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.
Clear. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.

Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the day then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.
